metadata.title: GitHub Project Board Recreation — vascadia v0.2-beta

current-state.fields: 14 configured (Status, Priority, Size, Estimate, Iteration — GOOD)
current-state.notes: Start date and Target date fields do NOT exist yet on project #6. Must be created via UI before roadmap sync can work. The reference project #4 has them because they were added manually.

milestone.name: v0.2-infrastructure
milestone.description: Docker, SkyPilot, Pulumi, CI, cloud setup

milestone.name: v0.2-training
milestone.description: Training flow, loss functions, model adapters, checkpointing

milestone.name: v0.2-data
milestone.description: Data loading, augmentation, DVC, external datasets

milestone.name: v0.2-evaluation
milestone.description: Analysis flow, ensemble builder, metrics, comparison

milestone.name: v0.2-biostatistics
milestone.description: Biostatistics flow, ANOVA, figures, tables, rankings

milestone.name: v0.2-deployment
milestone.description: Deploy flow, ONNX, BentoML, model registry

milestone.name: v0.2-dashboard
milestone.description: Dashboard flow, Gradio, health checks, QA

milestone.name: v0.2-compliance
milestone.description: Audit trail, regulatory docs, TRIPOD, EU AI Act

target-state.date-fields: Start date (createdAt), Target date (closedAt for closed issues)

phase.name: Manual UI Prerequisites
phase.description: Create date fields and fix iteration configuration in GitHub UI. These CANNOT be done via API — GitHub Projects V2 has no mutations for field creation or iteration configuration.

task.name: Add Start date field
task.action: Project Settings → Custom field → Date → name "Start date"
task.notes: Must match name exactly for sync_roadmap.py to find it

task.name: Add Target date field
task.action: Project Settings → Custom field → Date → name "Target date"

task.name: Reconfigure iterations
task.action: Project Settings → Iteration field → Edit: 1. Delete all 5 generic iterations (Iteration 1-5) 2. Create "Foundations for SkyPilot Train" — start 2026-02-23, duration 27 days 3. Mark it as completed 4. Create "QA + Publication Gate" — start 2026-03-23, duration 14 days
task.notes: Iteration names and dates cannot be set via API. Must be done in UI first. After this, we can assign issues to iterations programmatically.

task.name: Create Roadmap view
task.action: Project → New view → Layout: Roadmap → name "Roadmap"
task.notes: View creation has no API support

phase.name: Create Milestones
phase.description: Create semantic milestones for v0.2-beta release. Uses gh api REST endpoint.

task.name: Create 11 v0.2 milestones
task.command: for ms in \ "v0.2-infrastructure:Docker, SkyPilot, Pulumi, CI, cloud setup" \ "v0.2-training:Training flow, loss functions, model adapters, checkpointing" \ "v0.2-data:Data loading, augmentation, DVC, external datasets" \ "v0.2-evaluation:Analysis flow, ensemble builder, metrics, comparison" \ "v0.2-biostatistics:Biostatistics flow, ANOVA, figures, tables, rankings" \ "v0.2-observability:MLflow, lineage, profiling, drift detection" \ "v0.2-post-training:Post-training flow, calibration, conformal, SWAG" \ "v0.2-deployment:Deploy flow, ONNX, BentoML, model registry" \ "v0.2-dashboard:Dashboard flow, Gradio, health checks, QA" \ "v0.2-compliance:Audit trail, regulatory docs, TRIPOD, EU AI Act" \ "v0.2-models:SAM3, VesselFM, MambaVesselNet, DynUNet adapters"; do title="${ms%%:*}"; desc="${ms#*:}" gh api repos/petteriTeikari/vascadia/milestones \ -f title="$title" -f description="$desc" -f state=open done

phase.name: Add All Issues to Project
phase.description: Add all ~800 v0.2 issues to the project board. Uses gh api graphql addProjectV2ItemById mutation in batches.

task.name: Add issues not yet in project
task.description: For each issue not already in the project, call addProjectV2ItemById. Rate-limit to avoid GitHub API throttling (max ~5000 points/hour).

phase.name: Assign Milestones
phase.description: Auto-assign issues to milestones based on label + title heuristics.

task.name: Milestone assignment heuristics
task.rules: infrastructure: labels contain "infrastructure" OR title matches "Docker|SkyPilot|Pulumi|CI|cloud|GCP|RunPod|quota" training: labels contain "training" OR title matches "train|loss|checkpoint|epoch|fold|resume" data: labels contain "data" OR title matches "data|DVC|loader|augment|dataset|NIfTI|split" evaluation: title matches "analysis|ensemble|evaluat|comparison|champion|metrics reloaded" biostatistics: title matches "biostat|ANOVA|ranking|pairwise|variance|figure|table|LaTeX" observability: labels contain "observability" OR title matches "MLflow|lineage|drift|profil|metric.key|tracking" post-training: title matches "post.training|calibrat|conformal|SWAG|checkpoint.averag" deployment: title matches "deploy|ONNX|BentoML|serving|inference|model.registry" dashboard: title matches "dashboard|Gradio|health.check|QA.flow" compliance: labels contain "compliance" OR title matches "audit|regulatory|TRIPOD|EU.AI|IEC|FDA|SaMD" models: labels contain "models" OR title matches "SAM3|VesselFM|Mamba|DynUNet|adapter|model.family"

phase.name: Backfill Timeline Fields
phase.description: Set Start date = createdAt, Target date = closedAt for all items. Update sync_roadmap.py with new project field IDs first.

task.name: Update sync_roadmap.py with project #6 field IDs
task.description: Replace old project IDs with new ones from project #6.

phase.name: Set Priority/Size/Estimate
phase.description: Assign Priority, Size, Estimate based on labels and heuristics. Priority: read from P0/P1/P2 labels. Size: heuristic from issue type/age. Estimate: derived from Size (XS=1, S=2, M=3, L=5, XL=8).

task.name: Set Priority from labels
task.description: P0-critical → P0, P1-high → P1, P2-medium → P2. Issues without priority label get P2 by default.

task.name: Set Size and Estimate
task.description: Bug/fix → S(2), enhancement → M(3), research/science → L(5), infrastructure → M(3), refactor → S(2).

phase.name: Assign Iterations
phase.description: Assign closed issues to iteration 1 (before Mar 22) or iteration 2 (Mar 23+). Open issues go to current iteration.

task.name: Iteration assignment rules
task.rules: "Foundations for SkyPilot Train": closedAt before 2026-03-23 OR createdAt before 2026-03-23 AND state=closed "QA + Publication Gate": closedAt >= 2026-03-23 OR state=open

phase.name: Set Status
phase.description: Set Status based on issue state: closed → Done, open → Backlog/In progress.

task.name: Status assignment rules
task.rules: Done: state=closed In progress: state=open AND labels contain "P0" or has recent activity Backlog: state=open AND no P0 label

execution-notes.note: Phase 0 MUST be done manually in the GitHub UI before any automated phase.
Phases 1-7 can run sequentially in one script (~30 min total API time).
Rate limiting: GitHub GraphQL has 5000 points/hour. Each mutation costs 1 point. With ~800 issues × ~4 mutations each = ~3200 points. Should fit in one hour.
The sync_roadmap.py script needs field IDs updated for project #6. Copy the field IDs from the current-state section above.
After all phases, manually verify the Roadmap view in GitHub UI.
